lingala.open_questions_no_answer_key: Mituna ya polele (clé ya eyano ezali te)
lingala.explain_in_your_own_words: Limbola na maloba na yo moko…
lingala.build_replicate_transcribe_translate_m: Tonga • Kokanola • Kokoma • Kobongola • Kobongwana • CRISPR • Siansi ya bosambisi
lingala.a_pairs_with_t_2_bonds_g_with_c_3_wats: A ekangamaka na T (bond 2), G na C (3). Watson + Crick + Franklin (1953) basilisaki lolenge oyo na X-ray crystallography. Lolenge yango emonisi ndenge DNA ekomiselaka yango moko mpe etangamaka.
lingala.helicase_splits_the_strands_dna_polyme: Helicase ekabolaka strand; DNA polymerase esalaka strand ya kokokisa. Semi-conservative — helix ya sika moko na moko ezali na strand ya kala moko + ya sika moko. Meselson na Stahl balakisaki yango na 1958.
lingala.transcribe_dna_mrna_in_the_nucleus: Kokoma — DNA → mRNA (na kati ya nucleus)
lingala.rna_polymerase_reads_one_dna_strand_3_: RNA polymerase etangaka DNA strand moko 3′→5′ mpe esalaka RNA 5′→3′. Balɛtrɛ ezali ndenge moko, kaka T ekómaka U. mRNA ememaka mokano tii na ribosome — litambe ya liboso ya central dogma.
lingala.64_codons_20_amino_acids_the_genetic_c: codon 64 → amino acid 20 (genetic code ezali mingi). AUG ebandaka; UAA/UAG/UGA etɛlɛmisaka. tRNA etangaka codon, ememaka amino acid ya malamu, esalaka peptide bond.
lingala.point_mutation_one_letter_swapped_inse: Point mutation — balɛtrɛ moko ebongwani. Insertion/deletion — reading frame ememami, protein mobimba ya nse ebebi. Sickle cell anemia ezali kaka A→T moko — balɛtrɛ moko, bopusi ya bomoi mobimba.
lingala.bacterial_immune_system_repurposed_cas: Ebongiseli ya bomikɛngɛli ya bakteri ezongisami mpo na mosala mosusu. Cas9 enzyme + guide RNA = ciza ya molekile. Doudna + Charpentier balongaki Nobel 2020. CRISPR therapy ya liboso (sickle cell) FDA endimaki yango na Disɛmbɛ 2023.
lingala.sequence_determines_structure_determin: Sequence ekataka structure oyo ekataka mosala. Hemoglobin ememaka O₂, antibody eyebaka, enzyme esalaka catalyze. AlphaFold (2020) esakolaki structure milio 200 — mokakatano ya mbula 50 esilisami na sanza 18.
lingala.forensics_str_profiling_dna_evidence: Siansi ya bosambisi — STR profiling + litatoli ya DNA
lingala.codis_uses_20_short_tandem_repeat_str_: CODIS esalelaka short tandem repeat (STR) loci 20. Likoki ya bokokani ezali moko na kati ya quadrillion soki loci nyonso ekokani. Innocence Project — bitumbu koleka 245 ya libunga elongolamaki na komekama DNA nsima ya bosambisi.
lingala.practice_transcription_translation_mut: Salá momesano ya transcription, translation, bokaboli ya mutation. AP Bio Big Idea 3.A.1 — DNA (ntango mosusu RNA) ezali moboko ya bopanzani ya sango ya libota. NGSS HS-LS3-1.
lingala.retrieval_practice_gamified_speed_buil: Momesano ya bozongisi — na lolenge ya lisano. Mbangu esalaka automaticity — soki kotala codon table ekómi na yango moko, working memory na yo ekómi na bonsomi mpo na makanisi ya likolo, lokola kosakola bopusi ya mutation.
lingala.dna_rna_protein_with_retroviruses_hiv_: DNA → RNA → protein — elongo na retrovirus (HIV) oyo ekendaka nsima na reverse transcriptase. Crick asalaki liloba "dogma" na 1957; na nsima alobaki elimboli likanisi, kasi bosolo oyo bakoki koboya te te.
lingala.pick_a_sequence_the_complementary_stra: Poná sequence — strand ya kokokisa etondisami na base pairing (A-T, G-C). DNA ya solo esalemaka boye ntango nyonso.
lingala.helicase_unwinds_the_helix_dna_polymer: Helicase efungolaka helix; DNA polymerase etangaka template strand moko na moko mpe etyaka bokokisi na yango. Semi-conservative — daughter strand moko na moko ezali na ya kala moko + ya sika moko.
lingala.rna_polymerase_reads_the_template_stra: RNA polymerase etangaka template strand. Mibeko ya complementarity ndenge moko, kasi T → U. Litomba — mRNA copy moko ya single-strand, ya kobongama mpo na kobima na nucleus.
lingala.ribosome_reads_codons_3_bases_at_a_tim: Ribosome etangaka codon (base 3 mbala moko). codon moko na moko → amino acid moko. Genetic code etangamaka lokola triplet oyo emikangamaka te, ezanga virgule.
lingala.point_mutations_silent_no_protein_chan: Point mutation — silent (protein ebongwani te), missense (amino acid moko ekeseni), nonsense (kotelema noki). Frameshift (insertion/deletion) mbala mingi ebebisaka.
lingala.guide_rna_points_cas9_to_a_20_base_tar: Guide RNA elakisaka Cas9 na target ya 20-base. Cas9 ekataka strand mibale. Repair pathway ya selile ekangaka gene to ebakisaka template oyo opesi.
lingala.primary_sequence_secondary_helix_sheet: Primary (sequence) → secondary (α-helix, β-sheet) → tertiary (kokanga 3D) → quaternary (multi-subunit). Kobongola amino acid moko ekoki kobebisa kokanga.
lingala.str_profiling_13_20_short_tandem_repea: STR profiling — short tandem repeat loci 13-20. Likoki ya bokokani na mobulu na kati ya loci nyonso ezali soki moko na kati ya miliyar. Esalelamaka na CODIS, paternity test, mpe forensic lab.
lingala.a_new_dna_puzzle_every_session_transla: Puzzle ya DNA ya sika na session moko na moko. Bongolá, yebá mutation, luká ORF to silisá likambo ya forensic. Streak counter elandaka elonga ya mokolo na mokolo.
lingala.speed_translation_duel_decode_codons_f: Momekano ya mbangu ya bobongoli. Decode codon nokinoki ozali kobunda na wolulé. Meká soki genetic code ezali na moto na yo, kaka na reference card te.
lingala.codon_table_base_pairing_rules_key_ter: Codon table, mibeko ya base pairing, maloba ya ntina (ORF, intron, exon, promoter, repressor) — cheat sheet oyo okoki kozonga kotala mbala na mbala.
lingala.mrna_is_a_copy_of_the_coding_strand_wi: 💡 mRNA ezali copy ya coding strand epai U ezwaka esika ya T. (RNA polymerase etangaka complementary template strand 3'→5', epesaka sequence ndenge moko na coding strand.)
lingala.no_pam_sites_ngg_found_try_a_different: ⚠️ PAM site (NGG) emonani te. Meká DNA sequence mosusu na Build tab.
lingala.double_strand_break_created_choose_rep: ✂️ Double-strand break esalemi! Poná repair pathway:
lingala.crispr_clustered_regularly_interspaced: CRISPR (Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats) ezali gene-editing technology oyo eutaki na bomikɛngɛli ya bakteri.
lingala.a_20nt_rna_that_directs_cas9_to_the_ta: — RNA ya ~20nt oyo ekambaka Cas9 na target
lingala.protospacer_adjacent_motif_ngg_require: — Protospacer Adjacent Motif (NGG). Esengeli mpo na binding.
lingala.gene_therapy_sickle_cell_casgevy_cance: Gene therapy (sickle cell → CASGEVY™), cancer immunotherapy, injiniya ya milona, bandakisa ya bokono.
lingala.ala_val_leu_ile_pro_phe_trp_met_gly: Ala, Val, Leu, Ile, Pro, Phe, Trp, Met, Gly
lingala.ser_thr_cys_tyr_asn_gln: Ser, Thr, Cys, Tyr, Asn, Gln
lingala.predict_the_effect_type_from_5_options: Sakolá lolenge ya bopusi na kati ya baponi 5.
lingala.10_mutation_vignettes_each_shows_a_sho: Mutation vignette 10. Moko na moko emonisaka DNA sequence ya mokuse liboso/nsima ezali komonisa mbongwana. Poná lolenge ya bopusi — silent, missense, nonsense, frameshift, to in-frame indel. Nsima ya kopona, coaching elimbolaka mpo na nini bopusi oyo ezali na likoki koleka bamosusu.
lingala.pick_the_mutation_effect_type: Poná lolenge ya bopusi ya mutation
lingala.test_your_genetics_knowledge: Meká boyebi na yo ya genetics!
lingala.polar_hydroxyl_side_chain_often_phosph: Polar, hydroxyl side chain. Mbala mingi phosphorylated.
lingala.forms_disulfide_bonds_s_s_critical_for: Esalaka disulfide bond (S-S). Ya ntina mpo na protein folding.
lingala.aromatic_hydrophobic_largest_amino_aci: Aromatic, hydrophobic. amino acid ya monene koleka.
lingala.basic_side_chain_active_site_of_many_e: Basic side chain. active site ya enzyme mingi (pKa ~7).
lingala.polar_amide_common_n_glycosylation_sit: Polar amide. N-glycosylation site ya momesano.
lingala.basic_long_side_chain_often_acetylated: Basic, long side chain. Mbala mingi acetylated/methylated.
lingala.basic_guanidinium_group_6_codons_most_: Basic, guanidinium group. codon 6 — degenerate koleka.
lingala.acidic_most_abundant_in_proteins: Acidic. Ya ebele koleka na protein.
lingala.smallest_no_side_chain_high_flexibilit: Ya moke koleka. Side chain te — flexibility ya likolo.
lingala.helicase_unwinds_the_double_helix_at_o: Helicase efungolaka double helix na replication origin. Single-strand binding protein epekisaka re-annealing. Topoisomerase ekitisaka supercoil tension liboso ya fork.
lingala.primase_lays_down_short_10_nt_rna_prim: Primase etyaka RNA primer ya mokuse (~10 nt) — DNA polymerase esengeli na 3'-OH mpo na extend, yango wana ekoki kobanda strand ya sika yango moko te.
lingala.synthesized_continuously_5_3_in_the_sa: Esalemaka na kokoba 5'→3' na nzela moko na replication fork ezali kotambola. primer moko na origin moko na moko.
lingala.synthesized_in_short_100_1000_nt_fragm: Esalemaka lokola fragment ya mikuse 100-1000 nt (Okazaki fragment) mpo polymerase ekoki extend kaka 5'→3'. Fragment moko na moko esengeli primer na yango.
lingala.rna_primers_are_excised_and_replaced_w: RNA primer ekatamaka mpe ezongisami na DNA nucleotide.
lingala.joins_okazaki_fragments_by_forming_the: Ekangisaka Okazaki fragment na kosala phosphodiester bond ya nsuka.
lingala.polymerase_checks_each_base_mismatches: Polymerase etalaka base moko na moko; mismatch elongolamaka mpe ezongisami. Ekitisaka error rate longwa na ~10⁻⁵ tii na ~10⁻⁷.
lingala.catches_the_few_mismatches_that_escape: Ekangaka mismatch moke oyo ekimaki proofreading. error rate ya nsuka — ~10⁻¹⁰ na base pair moko na moko.
lingala.rna_polymerase_binds_the_promoter_e_g_: RNA polymerase ekangamaka na promoter (ndakisa TATA box ~25 bp upstream ya transcription start). Esalisaka melt DNA double helix.
lingala.polymerase_reads_template_strand_3_5_s: Polymerase etangaka template strand 3'→5' mpe esalaka synthesize mRNA 5'→3'. Na bakteri ebakisaka ~nucleotide 30 na segɔnde; ~10-50 na eukaryote.
lingala.bacteria_rho_dependent_or_intrinsic_te: Bakteri — rho-dependent to intrinsic termination (hairpin loop). Eukaryote — cleavage mpe polyadenylation signal.
lingala.7_methylguanosine_cap_added_to_5_end_h: 7-methylguanosine cap ebakisami na 5' end. Esalisaka ribosome eyeba mRNA + ebatelaka na degradation.
lingala.introns_removed_exons_joined_by_the_sp: Intron elongolami, exon ekangisami na spliceosome. Alternative splicing → protein mingi na gene moko.
lingala.100_250_adenine_nucleotides_added_to_3: adenine nucleotide ~100-250 ebakisami na 3' end. Ekómisaka mRNA makasi + emonisaka export na yango.
lingala.mature_mrna_exits_through_nuclear_pore: mRNA oyo ekɔmɛli ebimaka na nuclear pore tii na cytoplasm.
lingala.small_ribosomal_subunit_binds_mrna_ini: Small ribosomal subunit ekangamaka na mRNA. Initiator tRNA (ememaka Met) ekangamaka na start codon AUG. Large subunit ekɔtaka.
lingala.each_cycle_aminoacyl_trna_enters_a_sit: Zunga moko na moko — aminoacyl-tRNA ekɔtaka A site → peptide bond esalemi (23S rRNA esali catalyze, ribozyme) → ribosome ememami codon moko → tRNA ekei A→P→E.
lingala.stop_codon_uaa_uag_uga_recognized_by_r: Stop codon (UAA/UAG/UGA) eyebani na release factor. Peptide etikami, ribosome ekabwani.
lingala.chaperones_hsp70_groel_help_proteins_f: Chaperone (Hsp70, GroEL) esalisaka protein ekanga malamu. Post-translational modification — phosphorylation, glycosylation, cleavage, disulfide bond.
lingala.codon_changes_but_amino_acid_is_the_sa: Codon ebongwani, kasi amino acid ezali ndenge moko (genetic code redundancy). Bopusi ezali te.
lingala.codon_changes_different_amino_acid_eff: Codon ebongwani → amino acid ekeseni. Bopusi longwa na eloko te (conservative substitution) tii na makasi (sickle cell — Glu→Val).
lingala.codon_changes_stop_codon_truncated_pro: Codon ebongwani → STOP codon. Protein ekatami, mbala mingi non-functional.
lingala.adds_nucleotide_s_if_not_a_multiple_of: Ebakisaka nucleotide. Soki ezali multiple ya 3 te, reading frame ememami → codon nyonso ya nse ebongwani. Mbala mingi makasi.
lingala.removes_nucleotide_s_same_frameshift_c: Elongolaka nucleotide. Litomba ya frameshift ndenge moko na insertion.
lingala.extra_copies_of_a_gene_or_region_can_l: Bakopi ya mabakisi ya gene to zone. Ekoki komema dosage effect (Down syndrome = chromosome 21 ya mabakisi).
lingala.segment_of_chromosome_flipped_may_disr: Eteni ya chromosome ebalusami. Ekoki kobebisa gene na breakpoint.
lingala.segment_moves_to_a_different_chromosom: Eteni ekei na chromosome mosusu. Ya lokumu — Philadelphia chromosome (CML; BCR-ABL fusion).
lingala.repeating_unit_e_g_cag_expands_across_: Unité oyo ezongelaka (ndakisa CAG) epanzanaka na kati ya milɔ́ngɔ́. Huntington (CAG na HTT), fragile X (CGG na FMR1), myotonic dystrophy.
lingala.pairs_1_22_numbered_roughly_by_size_wi: Bapaire 1-22 (etangami pene na bonene, na baexcepsion — chr. 21 ezali moke koleka chr. 22).
lingala.xx_female_or_xy_male_y_is_much_smaller: XX (mwasi) to XY (mobali). Y ezali moke mingi, ememaka gene moke (~70) na kokokanisa na X (~800).
lingala.total_human_chromosomes: Motango mobimba ya chromosome ya bomoto
lingala.23_pairs_diploid_in_somatic_cells_game: Bapaire 23 (diploid na somatic cell). Gamete ezali haploid (chromosome 23, paire te).
lingala.total_human_genes: Motango mobimba ya gene ya bomoto
lingala.surprisingly_few_many_genes_produce_mu: Moke na kokamwa — gene mingi esalaka protein mingi na alternative splicing. Eteni monene ya genome ezali regulatory to non-coding.
lingala.if_stretched_out_1_8_m_of_dna_per_cell: Soki ebendami, ~1.8 m ya DNA na selile moko na moko. Ekɔtisami na nucleus ya ~10 µm na histone + supercoiling.
lingala.maternally_inherited_codes_for_37_gene: Ezwami epai ya mama. Esalaka code gene 37 (protein 13, tRNA 22, rRNA 2). Bakopi mingi na mitochondrion moko na moko.
lingala.amplifies_a_specific_dna_segment_by_2_: Emataka DNA segment ya sikisiki na 2ⁿ (bazunga n). Esalelaka Taq polymerase oyo ekangaka na molunge. Moboko ya molecular biology ya lelo.
lingala.reads_dna_sequence_using_chain_termina: Etangaka DNA sequence na kosalela chain-terminating dideoxynucleotide. Read length ~800-1000 bp. Sikoyo mbala mingi ezongisami na next-generation sequencing.
lingala.massively_parallel_sequences_millions_: Massively parallel — esalaka sequence milio ya fragment na mbala moko. Illumina ekonzaka. Read length ~100-300 bp, miliyar na run moko na moko.
lingala.programmable_gene_editing_guide_rna_ta: Programmable gene editing. Guide RNA ekambaka nuclease Cas9 na DNA ya sikisiki. Cut esalaka gene knockout to HDR-mediated insertion. Nobel 2020.
lingala.edits_a_single_base_without_double_str: Ebongisaka base moko kozanga double-strand break. off-target effect moke koleka Cas9.
lingala.bacterial_proteins_that_cut_dna_at_spe: Protein ya bakteri oyo ekataka DNA na sequence ya sikisiki 4-8 bp. Esalaki recombinant DNA technology ekoka kosalema. Nobel 1978.
lingala.joins_dna_fragments_via_phosphodiester: Ekangisaka DNA fragment na phosphodiester bond. T4 DNA ligase ezali cloning workhorse.
lingala.separates_dna_fragments_by_size_in_an_: Ekabolaka DNA fragment na bonene na kati ya electric field. fragment ya mike ekei nokinoki na gel matrix.
lingala.thousands_of_dna_probes_on_a_chip_meas: Nkóto ya DNA probe na chip. Emekaka gene expression to detect SNP na parallel.
lingala.sequences_mrna_from_individual_cells_r: Esalaka sequence mRNA na selile moko na moko. Emonisaka cell-type heterogeneity oyo bulk RNA-seq ebungisaka.
lingala.near_atomic_structures_of_rna_dna_comp: Structure ya near-atomic ya RNA/DNA complex kozanga crystallization. Ya makasi mpo na ribosome, spliceosome, replisome.
lingala.read_lengths_up_to_100kb_vs_illumina_s: Read length tii na 100 kb+ (na kotalanisa na ~300 bp ya Illumina). Malamu koleka mpo na structural variant, repeat, full-length transcript.
lingala.differential_reproduction_based_on_her: Bobotami ekeseni na kotalela variation oyo ekoki kozwama na libota. Gene oyo ebongisaka survival/reproduction ekómaka ya momesano koleka na milɔ́ngɔ́.
lingala.random_source_of_new_genetic_variation: Liziba ya mobulu ya genetic variation ya sika. Mbala mingi neutral to ya mabe; mbala moke ya litomba. substrate ya selection.
lingala.random_changes_in_allele_frequency_esp: Mabongwana ya mobulu na allele frequency, mingimingi na population ya moke. Founder effect + bottleneck ezali bandakisa ya makasi.
lingala.movement_of_alleles_between_population: Botamboli ya allele kati na population na migration. Ekitisaka bokeseni kati na population; ematisaka diversity na kati ya population.
lingala.formation_of_new_species_usually_via_r: Bosaleli ya species ya sika, mbala mingi na reproductive isolation. Allopatric (bokaboli ya mabele) ezali ya momesano koleka.
lingala.unrelated_organisms_evolve_similar_tra: Bikelamu oyo ezali na boyokani te esalaka evolve bizaleli oyo ekokani na bomoko na yango (mapapu na bandeke, ngɛmbɔ, banyama; liso na vertebrate + cephalopod).
lingala.all_life_shares_a_common_ancestor_luca: Bomoi nyonso ekabolaka nkɔkɔ moko (LUCA). Litatoli — genetic code, ribosome, ATP, glycolysis, biochemistry ya moboko oyo ekabolami.
lingala.diagram_showing_evolutionary_relations: Diagramme emonisaka boyokani ya evolution. Esalemaka mingi na bokokanisi ya DNA sequence na esika ya morphology.
lingala.allele_frequencies_stay_constant_under: allele frequency etikalaka ndenge moko na nse ya makanisi ya no-evolution — population monene, random mating, selection/mutation/migration/drift te. p² + 2pq + q² = 1.
lingala.interactive_references_pick_a_topic_be: Bareferanse ya interactive — poná lisolo na nse mpo na kolukaluka.
lingala.five_nitrogenous_bases_make_up_dna_rna: nitrogenous base mitano esalaka DNA + RNA — A, T, G, C (DNA); A, U, G, C (RNA). Purine (A, G) ezali na ring 2; pyrimidine (T, U, C) ezali na 1. Pairing na kotalela H-bond pattern ya sikisiki.
lingala.64_codons_4_encode_20_amino_acids_3_st: codon 64 (4³) esalaka code amino acid 20 + stop signal 3. Code ezali mingi (degenerate) — amino acid mingi ezali na codon mingi, mbala mingi ekeseni na esika ya misato ("wobble"). Universal pene na bomoi nyonso.
lingala.third_codon_position_pairs_less_strict: Esika ya misato ya codon ekangamaka na makasi moke — tRNA moko ekoki koyeba codon mingi. Ekitisaka motango ya tRNA oyo esengeli (cell ezali na ~30-40, 64 te).
lingala.semi_conservative_each_new_helix_has_o: Semi-conservative — helix ya sika moko na moko ezali na parental moko + newly-synthesized strand moko. Meselson-Stahl balakisaki na 1958. ~50 bp/segɔnde na bakteri; ~50 bp/segɔnde na fork na eukaryote (kasi nkóto ya fork parallel).
lingala.rna_polymerase_reads_dna_template_3_5_: RNA polymerase etangaka DNA template (3'→5') mpe esalaka synthesize mRNA (5'→3'). Na eukaryote, primary transcript esalemaka process mingi liboso ya export.
lingala.ribosome_reads_mrna_in_3_base_codons_a: Ribosome etangaka mRNA lokola 3-base codon mpe esalaka protein. ~10-20 amino acid/segɔnde na bakteri; ~3-5 na eukaryote. Ribosome mingi ekoki translate mRNA moko (polyribosome).
lingala.mutations_range_from_invisible_silent_: Mutation ezali longwa na oyo emonanaka te (silent) tii na oyo ebomaka. Bopusi na yango etaleli nini ebongwani, wapi, mpe na cell type nini.
lingala.a_sampling_of_well_characterized_genet: Ndakisa ya mikakatano ya libota oyo elimbolami malamu. Ebele ya genetic counseling mpe therapy ya lelo ezali kokola — mpo na bikateli ya clinical talá mikanda ya lelo.
lingala.family_a_three_generations_blue_eyes: Libota A — milɔ́ngɔ́ misato, miso ya bule
lingala.two_unaffected_parents_gen_i_have_one_: Baboti mibale oyo bazwami te (gen. I) bazali na mwana moko oyo azwami + moko oyo azwami te (gen. II). Mwana oyo azwami + moninga oyo azwami te bazali na moko oyo azwami + moko oyo azwami te (gen. III). Ezaleli emonanaka na pene 25% ya bana na cross ya baoyo bazwami te.
lingala.trait_skips_generations_unaffected_par: Ezaleli epumbwaka milɔ́ngɔ́ (baboti oyo bazwami te → mwana oyo azwami).
lingala.parents_must_be_heterozygous_carriers_: Baboti basengeli kozala heterozygous carrier oyo moko na moko apesaka recessive allele moko.
lingala.affected_individuals_appear_in_both_se: Bato oyo bazwami emonanaka na bokási nyonso mibale na frequency pene ndenge moko.
lingala.affected_aa_homozygous_carriers_aa_are: Oyo azwami = aa homozygous; carrier (Aa) ezali phenotypically oyo bazwami te.
lingala.family_b_color_blindness_across_three_: Libota B — bokufi ya langi ya miso na milɔ́ngɔ́ misato
lingala.affected_grandfather_gen_i_has_unaffec: Nkɔkɔ oyo azwami (gen. I) azali na mwana mwasi oyo azwami te (gen. II) mpe mwana ya mwana oyo azwami na nzela ya mwana mwasi wana (gen. III). Mwana mobali oyo azwami te ezali te epai ya tata oyo azwami te. Ezaleli emonanaka mingi na mibali.
lingala.trait_shows_strong_male_bias_hemizygou: Ezaleli emonisaka male bias ya makasi (hemizygous mibali bamonisaka yango; basi basengeli copy 2).
lingala.unaffected_daughter_of_affected_grandf: Mwana mwasi oyo azwami te ya nkɔkɔ oyo azwami ezali carrier ya kotinda.
lingala.trait_skips_generation_through_carrier: Ezaleli epumbwaka libota na nzela ya mwana mwasi carrier, na nsima emonana lisusu na mwana ya mwana.
lingala.no_father_to_son_transmission_sons_inh: Father-to-son transmission ezali te (bana mibali bazwaka Y epai ya tata, X te).
lingala.family_c_huntington_like_late_onset_tr: Libota C — ezaleli oyo ebandaka na nsima lokola Huntington
lingala.every_affected_individual_has_at_least: Moto nyonso oyo azwami azali na ata moboti moko oyo azwami. Ezaleli emonanaka na libota moko na moko. ~50% ya bana ya baboti oyo bazwami bazwami. Ndenge moko na mibali + basi.
lingala.trait_appears_in_every_generation_no_s: Ezaleli emonanaka na libota moko na moko (epumbwaka te).
lingala.every_affected_individual_has_at_least_2: Moto nyonso oyo azwami azali na ata moboti moko oyo azwami.
lingala.roughly_50_of_children_of_an_affected_: ~50% ya bana ya heterozygote oyo azwami bazwami.
lingala.equal_frequency_in_males_females_autos: frequency ndenge moko na mibali + basi — autosomal, sex-linked te.
lingala.inheritance_pattern_reasoning_ranking_: Inheritance pattern + reasoning ranking — esengeli kondimisa nyonso mibale liboso ya reveal. Reveal epesaka ranking na yo puwɛ litambe na litambe, kaka eyano na yo ya nsuka te. Botuni ya solo esɛngaka oyeba mpo na nini, kaka nini te.
lingala.2_rank_these_explanations_most_least_s: 2. Tyá ndimbola oyo na molɔngɔ (mingi → moke ya kolendisa):
lingala.notice_the_ranking_grade_is_independen: Talá — ranking grade ezali na bonsomi longwa na pattern grade — okoki koyeba nini ezali malamu kasi otya mpo na nini na molɔngɔ ya mabe.
lingala.during_gamete_formation_the_two_allele: Na tango ya bosaleli ya gamete, allele mibale ya gene moko na moko ekabwani, mpo gamete moko na moko ememaka allele moko.
lingala.alleles_for_different_genes_assort_ind: allele ya gene ekeseni esalaka assort na bonsomi moko na mosusu na tango ya bosaleli ya gamete (gene na chromosome ekeseni).
lingala.when_two_different_alleles_are_present: Tango allele mibale ekeseni ezali, moko (dominant) emonisaka wana mosusu (recessive) ebombami.
lingala.methyl_group_ch_added_to_cytosines_esp: Methyl group (–CH₃) ebakisami na cytosine, mingimingi na CpG island. Mbala mingi ekómisaka gene expression nyɛɛ.
lingala.acetylation_methylation_phosphorylatio: Acetylation, methylation, phosphorylation ya histone tail. Ebongolaka chromatin packaging.
lingala.atp_dependent_complexes_slide_or_eject: ATP-dependent complex esalaka slide to ebimisaka nucleosome mpo na komonisa DNA.
lingala.mirna_lncrna_regulate_gene_expression_: miRNA, lncRNA esalaka contrôle gene expression na post-transcriptionally.
lingala.some_genes_expressed_only_from_materna: Gene mosusu emonisaka kaka epai ya maternal to paternal allele. Methylation mark.
lingala.some_epigenetic_marks_survive_gametoge: epigenetic mark mosusu ebikaka na gametogenesis mpe eleka na offspring.
lingala.who_can_access_your_genome_gina_2008_u: Nani akoki kokɔta na genome na yo? GINA (2008, US) epekisaka genetic discrimination na mosala + health insurance, kasi na life insurance te.
lingala.23andme_ancestrydna_reveal_ancestry_he: 23andMe, AncestryDNA emonisaka ancestry + health risk. Mitungisi — incidental finding, bosikisiki, kokabola data na third party.
lingala.in_2018_he_jiankui_edited_embryos_for_: Na 2018 He Jiankui abongisaki embryo mpo na HIV resistance → mapasa mabotami. Bapamelaki ye mingi. Mikili mingi epekisaka germline editing.
lingala.hypothetical_selection_or_editing_of_e: Boponi to bobongisi ya makanisi ya embryo mpo na bizaleli oyo ezali ya monganga te (molai, IQ). Sikoyo ezali na ndelo na tekiniki; tembe na etiki.
lingala.engineered_to_spread_through_wild_popu: Esalemaki mpo na kopanzana na wild population (ndakisa malaria resistance na ngungi). Ecological bozangi bobongwani ekoki kosalema.
lingala.should_we_test_for_untreatable_disease: Tosengeli kosala test mpo na bokono oyo ekoki kobika te (Huntington)? Basusu baponaka koyeba te.
lingala.familial_dna_searches_solved_cold_case: Familial DNA search esilisaki cold case (Golden State Killer, 2018) kasi ebimisaka mituna mpo na privacy ya bandeko oyo bandimaki te.
lingala.us_supreme_court_2013_ruled_that_natur: US Supreme Court (2013) ekataki ete DNA ya bomoto ekoki kozala patent te, kasi synthetic cDNA ekoki.
lingala.reference_genomes_historically_eurocen: Reference genome na lisolo ezali Eurocentric. Milende ya kobongisa reference diversity ezali kokoba (ndakisa human pangenome project).
lingala.genome_sizes_across_life: 📏 Bonene ya genome na bomoi mobimba
lingala.genome_size_does_not_correlate_with_or: Bonene ya genome ekokani na bonkaku ya organism te (C-value paradox). Bomoto ezali na gene count lokola roundworm — eteni monene ya DNA "ya mabakisi" na genome monene ezali non-coding.
lingala.heritable_changes_in_gene_expression_t: Mabongwana oyo ekoki kozwama na libota na gene expression kozanga mbongwana ya DNA sequence. Zingazinga, bilei, mitungisi ebimisaka.
lingala.building_blocks_of_proteins_9_are_esse: Biteni ya botongi ya protein. 9 ezali "essential" (ekoki synthesize te — esengeli kozwa na bilei) — His, Ile, Leu, Lys, Met, Phe, Thr, Trp, Val.
lingala.essentially_no_beneficial_fixation_exp: Na ntina, beneficial fixation ezelami te. Population ezali na mutation-selection balance to drift kaka.
lingala.drift_dominates_few_expected_fixations: Drift ekonzaka — fixation moke ezelami, ata soki mutation esalemi. Ya momesano na population ya moke.
lingala.a_handful_of_beneficial_mutations_expe: beneficial mutation moke ezelami kozala fixed. Standard mpo na population mingi ya bomoto.
lingala.many_fixations_expected_strong_selecti: fixation mingi ezelami — strong selection, population monene, to nyonso mibale. Ndakisa antibiotic resistance ya bakteri.
lingala.extreme_regime_viruses_cancer_cell_lin: Regime ya makasi — virus, cancer cell line, asexual lab population. adaptive sweep mingi na mbala moko.
lingala.mutation_inquiry_drift_selection_fixat: 🔬 Botuni ya mutation — Drift, Selection, Fixation
lingala.set_per_base_mutation_rate_population_: Tyá per-base mutation rate, population size, generation, mpe selection coefficient. Sakolá boni beneficial mutation ezali fixed ya solo. Score te, reveal te.
lingala.log_n_vs_log_circles_typical_regimes: log₁₀(N) vs. log₁₀(μ) — bazinga = regime ya momesano
lingala.your_hypothesis_which_slider_has_the_b: Likanisi na yo (slider nini ezali na bopusi ya monene koleka na fixation rate? Mpo na nini?)
lingala.e_g_selection_has_more_leverage_than_o: ndakisa selection ezali na leverage koleka μ tango N ezali monene mingi...
lingala.when_does_the_regime_move_from_drift_d: Ntango nini regime ememami longwa na drift-dominated tii na selection-dominated? N·s eyebisi yo nini?
lingala.why_are_antibiotic_resistance_and_vira: Mpo na nini antibiotic resistance mpe viral evolution ezali mbangu mingi — slider nini ezali na ndelo na yango?
lingala.a_neutral_mutation_s_0_has_fixation_pr: neutral mutation (s = 0) ezali na fixation probability 1/(2N). Yango elimboli nini mpo na large population?
lingala.could_the_same_population_size_be_drif: Population size ndenge moko ekoki kozala "drift-dominated" mpo na weak mutation mpe "selection-dominated" mpo na strong na mbala moko?
lingala.i_can_explain_why_this_n_g_s_combinati: Nakoki kolimbola mpo na nini bosangani μ × N × g × s oyo esalaka regime oyo.
lingala.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — score te, reveal te, answer dump te. Esalelaka Kimura full diploid fixation formula (1962) (1−e^(−2s))/(1−e^(−4Ns)), oyo esalaka interpolate kati na Haldane ~2s na strong-selection limit (Ns≫1) mpe neutral 1/(2N) na drift limit (Ns≪1 to s=0).
lingala.more_than_humans_20_000_many_novel_gen: Koleka bomoto (~20,000). Gene novel mingi mpo na sensory perception + cognition.
lingala.special_protein_dsup_wraps_dna_protect: Protein ya sikisiki (Dsup) ezingaka DNA mpe ebatelaka yango na kobeba ya X-ray. Boluki mpo na radiotherapy application.
lingala.hypersensitive_contact_inhibition_high: Hypersensitive contact inhibition + high-molecular-weight hyaluronan. Cancer ezali mpasi mingi.
lingala.elephants_have_20_copies_of_tumor_supp: Banzoku bazali na copy ~20 ya tumor suppressor TP53 (bomoto ezali na 1). Ndimbola oyo ekoki kozala mpo na cancer rate ya moke atako cell count monene.
lingala.axolotl_can_regrow_limbs_spinal_cord_h: Axolotl ekoki kobota lisusu maboko, spinal cord, motema, ata biteni ya bɔɔngɔ. Boluki mpo na regenerative medicine.
lingala.stores_fat_not_water_myth_allows_survi: Ebombaka mafuta, mai te (lokuta). Epesaka nzela ya kobika bapɔsɔ mingi kozanga bilei. Mai ezwamaka na komɛla + metabolic byproduct.
lingala.population_crashed_12_000_years_ago_ge: Population ekweaki ~mbula 12,000 eleki. Genetic bottleneck → diversity ya moke mingi. Cheetah moko na moko ezali genetically pene mapasa.
lingala.modern_whales_descended_from_land_mamm: Baleine ya lelo eutaki na banyama ya mabele oyo emɛlisaka (~mbula milio 50 eleki). Ndeko ya pene oyo ezali na bomoi — ngubu. Vestigial pelvic bone ezali naino.
lingala.wide_variation_adder_s_tongue_fern_720: Bokeseni monene. Adder's-tongue fern — bapaire ~720 (mingi koleka ya kokomama). Loso — bapaire 12. Bomoto — bapaire 23.
lingala.all_female_asexual_for_80_million_year: Nyonso basi, asexual mpo na ~mbula milio 80. Ezwaka gene na species mosusu (HGT) na esika ya bokeseni na sex.
lingala.lobe_finned_fish_thought_extinct_since: Mbisi ya lobe-finned oyo bakanisaki esili banda eleko ya dinosaur. Bamonaki bandakisa ya bomoi na 1938. Molɔngɔ́ ~mbula milio 400.
lingala.blue_copper_based_hemocyanin_detects_b: Bule (copper-based hemocyanin). Esalaka detect bacterial endotoxin — esalelamaka mpo na test vaccine + medical device.
lingala.diverged_from_brown_bears_150_000_500_: Ekabwanaki na brown bear ~mbula 150,000-500,000 eleki. Bandimisaki grizzly-polar hybrid ("pizzly" to "grolar") mosusu na zamba.
lingala.dog_breed_genetics_wild_dna_facts: 🐕 Genetics ya bandenge ya mbwa + makambo ya DNA ya zamba
lingala.wild_dna_biology_trivia: DNA ya zamba + trivia ya biology
lingala.hormones_travel_through_the_bloodstrea: Hormone etambolaka na nzela ya makila mpo na kosala na target tissue ya mosika. Esalaka coordonner metabolism, bokoli, bobotami, stress response, mpe homeostasis.
lingala.approximate_elemental_composition_of_t: Composition ya biteni pene ya nzoto ya bomoto na mass. Biteni 11 kaka ezali >99%. CHNOPS (C, H, N, O, P, S) esalaka pene organic molecule nyonso.
lingala.recent_extinctions_mostly_human_caused: Bosili ya sika (mingi bomoto esali) + bosili ya kala ya lokumu. Mabele ezalaki na mass extinction 5 — mingi balobaka tozali na ya 6 sikoyo.
lingala.6co_6h_o_light_c_h_o_6o_powered_by_chl: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + pole → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Chlorophyll ekambaka yango. Liziba ya eteni monene ya oxygen ya mopɛpɛ.
lingala.c3_most_plants_c4_corn_sugarcane_effic: C3 (milona mingi), C4 (masango, nzete ya sukali — malamu na T ya likolo), CAM (cactus, succulent — efungolaka stomata na butu mpo na kobomba mai).
lingala.tiny_pores_on_leaves_let_co_in_o_water: Madusu ya mike na nkasa. Etikaka CO₂ ekɔta + O₂/mai ebima. Efungwamaka/ekangamaka na kotalela pole, mai, CO₂.
lingala.carries_water_minerals_up_from_roots_d: Ememaka mai + mineral na likolo longwa na misisa. Selile ekufi. Esalaka transpiration pull.
lingala.carries_sugars_from_leaves_to_rest_of_: Ememaka sukali longwa na nkasa tii na biteni mosusu ya molona. Selile ezali na bomoi. Nzela mibale.
lingala.plant_hormone_phototropism_growing_tow: Hormone ya molona. Phototropism (kokola epai ya pole). concentration na ngámbo ya elili → selile ekómi milai → egumbami epai ya pole.
lingala.gas_hormone_ripens_fruit_why_ripe_bana: Hormone ya gaz. Enokisaka mbuma. Mpo na nini litabe eteli enokisaka mbuma mosusu. Stress signaling.
lingala.promotes_stem_elongation_seed_germinat: Ebakisaka bolai ya nzete, bobimi ya mboto, bofuluki.
lingala.promotes_cell_division_delays_leaf_sen: Ebakisaka bokaboli ya selile. Ekɔmisaka bobange ya nkasa nsima.
lingala.stress_hormone_closes_stomata_when_wat: Hormone ya stress. Ekangaka stomata tango mai ekiti. Ebakisaka mpongi ya mboto.
lingala.angiosperm_unique_one_sperm_fertilizes: Angiosperm ezali ya sikisiki — sperm moko esalaka fɛrtilize egg cell (embryo), mosusu esalaka fɛrtilize polar nuclei (endosperm — bilei mpo na mboto).
lingala.flower_shape_color_scent_match_pollina: Lolenge ya fololo, langi, nsolo ekokani na baposa ya pollinator. Mosusu specialized mingi (orchid + mpululu ya sikisiki).
lingala.evolved_in_nutrient_poor_soils_venus_f: Ekolaki na mabele oyo ezali na bilei mingi te. Venus flytrap (snap trap), pitcher plant (pitfall trap), sundew (ya kokangama).
lingala.symbiosis_with_fungi_fungi_extend_root: Symbiosis na fungi. Fungi epesaka misisa nzela ya kopusana; molona epesaka sukali. ~85% ya plant species.
lingala.rhizobium_bacteria_in_root_nodules_con: Rhizobium bakteri na root nodule, ebongolaka N₂ → NH₃. Yango wana madɛsu + madɛsu ezali na protein mingi + ebongisaka mabele.
lingala.domestication_selected_larger_seeds_wh: Bobateli epɔnaki mboto ya minene (loso), oyo ekwei te (blé), mbuma ya elɛngi (pome). Kala mingi te — hybrid corn, GMO, marker-assisted selection.
lingala.common_in_plants_rare_in_animals_wheat: Ya momesano na milona (mpasi na banyama). Blé ezali hexaploid (set 6), strawberry ezali octoploid. Mbala mingi ebakisaka vigor + yield.
lingala.stiffening_compound_in_cell_walls_of_w: Composé oyo ekómisaka makasi na efelo ya selile ya mabaya. Yango wana mabaya ezali makasi + epɔlaka malɛmbɛ.
lingala.individuals_of_one_species_in_an_area: Bato moko na moko ya species moko na zone.
lingala.all_populations_interacting_in_an_area: Population nyonso oyo esalaka interaction na zone.
lingala.all_ecosystems_on_earth_the_zone_of_li: Ecosystem nyonso na mabele. Zone ya bomoi.
lingala.role_of_a_species_in_its_ecosystem_two: Mokumba ya species na ecosystem na yango. Species mibale ekoki kozwa niche moko te (competitive exclusion).
lingala.physical_place_where_an_organism_lives: Esika ya nzoto epai organism efandaka.
lingala.network_of_who_eats_whom_trophic_level: Network ya nani aliaka nani. Trophic level — producer → primary consumer → secondary → mpe bongo na bongo.
lingala.make_own_food_plants_algae_some_bacter: Esalaka bilei na yango. Milona, algae, bakteri mosusu. Moboko ya food chain.
lingala.get_food_by_eating_others_herbivores_c: Ezwaka bilei na kolia bamosusu. Herbivore, carnivore, omnivore.
lingala.break_down_dead_matter_fungi_bacteria_: Ebukaka biloko oyo ekufi. Fungi, bakteri, decomposer. Esalaka recycle bilei.
lingala.close_interaction_between_species_mutu: Interaction ya pene kati na species. Mutualism (+/+), commensalism (+/0), parasitism (+/−).
lingala.disproportionate_effect_on_ecosystem_d: Bopusi oyo ekokani te na ecosystem atako motango moke. Otter ya mai ekonzaka sea urchin, oyo ekonzaka kelp.
lingala.maximum_population_size_environment_ca: Population size ya monene koleka oyo environment ekoki komema. Resource, predation, disease ekitisaka K.
lingala.population_grows_at_constant_rate_dn_d: Population ekolaka na taux ya kokoba. dN/dt = rN. Ekoki kokoba libela te.
lingala.growth_slows_as_n_approaches_k_dn_dt_r: Bokoli ekitaka tango N ezali kopusana na K. dN/dt = rN(K-N)/K. curve ya lolenge S.
lingala.many_offspring_little_parental_care_sh: Bana mingi, bobateli ya baboti moke, bomoi ya mokuse. Bankɔ́, matiti mabe. Boom-and-bust.
lingala.few_offspring_lots_of_care_long_lived_: Bana moke, bobateli mingi, bomoi ya molai. Baleine, bomoto, nzete ya chêne.
lingala.predictable_changes_in_community_over_: Mabongwana oyo ekoki koyebana na communauté na tango. Primary (libanga ya polele) vs. secondary (nsima ya mobulu).
lingala.variety_of_life_species_richness_count: Bokeseni ya bomoi. Species richness (motango) + evenness (bokaboli). Biodiversity ya likolo → ecosystem resilience.
lingala.background_rate_1_species_per_million_: Background rate ~species 1 na milio mbula. Taux ya lelo ezali 100-1000× ya background mpo na bomoto.
lingala.major_life_zone_defined_by_climate_veg: Zone ya bomoi ya monene oyo climat + banzete elimbolaka. Tropical rainforest, esobe, tundra, savanna, bongo na bongo.
lingala.n_nh_fixation_no_no_nitrification_orga: N₂ → NH₃ (fixation) → NO₂⁻ → NO₃⁻ (nitrification) → organic N → zongá N₂ (denitrification).
lingala.co_photosynthesis_organic_c_respiratio: CO₂ ↔ photosynthesis ↔ organic C ↔ respiration. Fossil fuel ezongisaka C oyo bakundaki mpo na tango molai na mopɛpɛ.
lingala.evaporation_condensation_precipitation: Bopumbwi → bokangani → mbula → botioli/mai ya nse ya mabele → zongá na mbu.
lingala.movement_of_elements_c_n_p_s_through_b: Botamboli ya biteni (C, N, P, S) na nzela ya biotic + abiotic compartment.
lingala.each_chosen_for_properties_that_make_b: Moko na moko eponami mpo na bizaleli oyo esalaka biology ekoka kotambwisama — bonene, fast life cycle, kokola pɛtɛɛ, genetic tool.
lingala.heat_separates_double_stranded_dna_int: Molunge ekabolaka double-stranded DNA na single strand. Hydrogen bond ebukanaka.
lingala.primers_short_dna_sequences_bind_to_co: Primer (short DNA sequence) ekangamaka na zone ya kokokisa ya template strand moko na moko.
lingala.dna_polymerase_taq_from_thermus_aquati: DNA polymerase (Taq — longwa na Thermus aquaticus) esalaka extend primer mpe synthesize DNA ya sika.
lingala.each_cycle_doubles_target_dna_30_cycle: Zunga moko na moko emataka target DNA mbala mibale. bazunga 30 → ~10⁹-fold amplification.
lingala.kary_mullis_invented_pcr_1983_won_nobe: Kary Mullis asalaki PCR (1983); alongaki Nobel na 1993.
lingala.from_thermophilic_bacterium_in_hot_spr: Longwa na thermophilic bacterium na maziba ya mai ya moto. Ebikaka na denaturation step ya 95 °C.
lingala.fluorescent_dyes_report_on_amplificati: Fluorescent dye epesaka rapport ya amplification na real-time. Esalelamaka mpo na COVID test, gene expression.
lingala.reverse_transcription_pcr_converts_rna: Reverse transcription PCR. Ebongolaka RNA na cDNA liboso. Esalelamaka mpo na RNA virus (COVID, HIV, malali ya mopɛpɛ).
lingala.partitions_sample_into_thousands_of_dr: Ekabolaka sample na nkóto ya droplet. Etángaka ezali/ezali te — quantification ya sikisiki mingi.
lingala.diagnostics_forensics_gene_cloning_anc: Diagnostics, forensics, gene cloning, ancient DNA (lokola Jurassic Park; ya solo mbala mingi <milio mbula 1).
lingala.first_crispr_therapy_fda_approved_dec_: CRISPR therapy ya liboso FDA-approved (Disɛmbɛ 2023). Ebongisaka patient stem cell ex vivo.
lingala.crispr_engineers_t_cells_to_attack_can: CRISPR esalaka injiniya T cell mpo na kobundisa cancer. Phase I/II trial mingi.
lingala.crispr_knockout_libraries_reveal_which: CRISPR knockout library emonisaka gene nini ezali essential mpo na bokono.
lingala.faster_than_traditional_knockout_mice_: Mbangu koleka knockout mouse ya kala. Esalelamaka mingi na boluki.
lingala.disease_resistant_rice_mushrooms_that_: Loso oyo ekangaka bokono, bowa oyo ekómaka langi ya kafé te, blé gluten-free (mingi naino na boluki).
lingala.spread_sterility_or_malaria_resistance: Epanzaka bozangi bana to malaria resistance na wild population. Field trial naino na tembe.
lingala.he_jiankui_2018_edited_human_embryos_m: He Jiankui (2018) abongisaki human embryo → nkanda moral + scientific. Sikoyo epekisami na mikili mingi.
lingala.human_body_has_10_human_cells_10_10_mi: Nzoto ya bomoto ezali na ~10¹³ human cell + ~10¹³-10¹⁴ microbial cell. Pene ndenge moko na motango.
lingala.500_1_000_bacterial_species_in_healthy: bacterial species 500-1,000+ na misɔpɔ ya mokóló ya nzoto kolongono. Elongo na archaea, fungi, virus.
lingala.microbiome_carries_100_more_genes_than: Microbiome ememaka gene ~100× koleka human genome. Ebakisaka makoki mingi ya metabolic.
lingala.gut_microbes_communicate_with_brain_vi: Gut microbe esololaka na bɔɔngɔ na nzela ya vagus nerve, immune signal, metabolite. Ekangami na mood, ezaleli — kasi maloba mingi ya sikisiki emataki koleka.
lingala.broad_spectrum_antibiotics_wipe_out_co: Broad-spectrum antibiotic elongolaka commensal → kobika ekoki kozwa sanza/mbula. Shift mosusu etikalaka.
lingala.fecal_microbiota_transplant_fmt_cures_: Fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) esilisaka recurrent C. difficile infection na ~90% ya makambo. Bosaleli mosusu naino experimental.
lingala.varies_by_body_site_forehead_oily_domi: Ekeseni na body site — elongi (mafuta, Cutibacterium acnes ekonzaka), misɔpɔ (anaerobe), lipeka (motoki apocrine + bakteri → nsolo ya nzoto).
lingala.healthy_lactobacillus_dominant_low_ph_: Kolongono — Lactobacillus ekonzaka, pH ya nse. Bozangi bokatikati → bacterial vaginosis (BV).
lingala.700_species_affects_cavities_gum_disea: ~species 700. Ebimisaka madusu ya mino, bokono ya minu. Ekangami na cardiovascular risk.
lingala.vaginal_birth_seeds_infant_with_matern: Kobota na nzela ya vagin esalaka seed mwana na maternal vaginal microbe; C-section na skin microbe. Bopusi ya tango molai eyekolamaka (mosusu na tembe).
lingala.contains_live_bacteria_prebiotics_hmos: Ezali na live bacteria + prebiotic (HMO) oyo eleisaka gut microbe ya sikisiki (B. infantis).
lingala.sperm_egg_fuse_diploid_zygote_forms: Sperm + egg esanganaka. Diploid zygote esalemi.
lingala.rapid_cell_divisions_without_growth_2_: Bokaboli ya selile ya mbangu kozanga bokoli. Stage 2 → 4 → 8 → 16 cell.
lingala.hollow_ball_with_inner_cell_mass_futur: Bale ya mopepe na inner cell mass (embryo ya mikolo ekoya) + trophoblast (placenta ya mikolo ekoya).
lingala.blastocyst_attaches_to_uterine_wall: Blastocyst ekangamaka na efelo ya libumu.
lingala.cell_movements_form_3_germ_layers_ecto: Botamboli ya selile esalaka germ layer 3 — ectoderm, mesoderm, endoderm.
lingala.neural_tube_forms_from_ectoderm_future: Neural tube esalemaka na ectoderm. Bɔɔngɔ ya mikolo ekoya + spinal cord.
lingala.all_major_organs_begin_forming_heart_s: Biteni nyonso ya minene ebandaka kosalema. Motema ebandaka kobɛta ~pɔsɔ 4-5.
lingala.growth_maturation_major_structures_alr: Bokoli + bokɔmɛli. Ba structure ya minene esili kosalema.
lingala.cancer_cells_produce_their_own_growth_: Cancer cell esalaka growth signal na yango mpo na activate receptor na constitutively.
lingala.tumor_suppressors_p53_rb_inactivated_c: Tumor suppressor (p53, Rb) esalaka te → selile ekabwani atako stop signal.
lingala.apoptosis_pathways_disabled_damaged_ce: Apoptosis pathway esali te. selile oyo ebebi ezali na bomoi tango esengeli ekufa.
lingala.reactivate_telomerase_telomeres_mainta: Reactivate telomerase → telomere ebatelami → bokaboli kozanga ndelo.
lingala.tumors_recruit_blood_vessels_to_feed_g: Tumor esalaka recrute misisa ya makila mpo na koleisa mass oyo ezali kokola.
lingala.cells_lose_adhesion_migrate_colonize_d: selile ebungisaka adhesion, esalaka migrer, ekómisaka tissue ya mosika colonie.
lingala.warburg_effect_tumors_use_glycolysis_e: Warburg effect — tumor esalelaka glycolysis ata na oxygen.
lingala.tumors_hide_from_or_suppress_immune_su: Tumor ebombamaka na to esukisaka immune surveillance (PD-L1 expression).
lingala.chronic_inflammation_creates_a_permiss: Bofuluki ya molai esalaka environment ya kondima.
lingala.accumulating_mutations_chromosomal_rea: mutation oyo esangani + chromosomal rearrangement ekambaka evolution.
lingala.fast_non_specific_skin_mucus_complemen: Mbangu, non-specific. Loposo, mucus, complement, neutrophil, NK cell, macrophage.
lingala.slower_days_highly_specific_has_memory: Malɛmbɛ (na mikolo), specific mingi, ezali na memory. B cell (antibody) + T cell.
lingala.produce_antibodies_each_b_cell_makes_o: Esalaka antibody. B cell moko na moko esalaka specificity moko. B cell oyo esali activate ekómaka plasma cell.
lingala.coordinate_immune_response_hiv_target_: Esalaka coordonner immune response. target ya HIV. Ekambami longwa na naive tii na specialized subset (Th1, Th2, Th17, Treg).
lingala.kill_infected_or_cancerous_cells_via_p: Ebomaka selile oyo ezwi bokono to cancer na nzela ya perforin + granzyme.
lingala.y_shaped_proteins_5_classes_igg_most_a: Protein ya lolenge Y. class 5 — IgG (mingi koleka), IgA (mucosa), IgM (ya ebandeli), IgE (allergie + parasite), IgD (B-cell surface).
lingala.cell_surface_molecules_that_present_an: cell surface molecule oyo epesaka antigen na T cell. MHC I (selile nyonso, viral peptide). MHC II (immune cell, extracellular peptide).
lingala.plasma_proteins_that_punch_holes_in_pa: plasma protein oyo etoboláka madusu na pathogen + esalaka recrute phagocyte.
lingala.signaling_molecules_of_immune_system_i: signaling molecule ya immune system. Interferon (antiviral), interleukin (coordination), TNF (bofuluki).
lingala.long_lived_b_t_cells_from_prior_exposu: B + T cell ya bomoi molai longwa na exposition ya kala. Moboko ya vaccine + bomikɛngɛli ya bomoi mobimba.
lingala.train_adaptive_immunity_without_diseas: Esalaka train adaptive immunity kozanga bokono. mRNA (COVID), protein subunit, live attenuated, inactivated.
lingala.immune_system_attacks_self_type_1_diab: Immune system ebundisaka yango moko. Type 1 diabetes, RA, MS, lupus, Hashimoto.
lingala.ige_mediated_hypersensitivity_mast_cel: IgE-mediated hypersensitivity. Mast cell ebimisaka histamine.
lingala.dendrites_receive_soma_cell_body_axon_: Dendrite (kozwa), soma (cell body), axon (etindaka), terminal (ebimisaka neurotransmitter).
lingala.all_or_none_electrical_signal_sodium_i: All-or-none electrical signal. Sodium ekɔta → depolarize → potassium ebima → repolarize. ~1 ms. Speed — ~1 m/s (unmyelinated) tii na ~100 m/s (myelinated).
lingala.fatty_insulation_made_by_glia_oligoden: Insulation ya mafuta oyo glia (oligodendrocyte na CNS, Schwann cell na PNS) esali. Esalaka mbangu conduction. Ebebaka na MS.
lingala.junction_between_neurons_electrical_or: junction kati na neuron. Electrical to chemical (mbala mingi). Gap ~0.02 µm.
lingala.chemical_messengers_across_synapse_exc: chemical messenger na kati ya synapse. Excitatory (glutamate), inhibitory (GABA), modulatory (serotonin, dopamine).
lingala.reward_motivation_motor_control_low_in: Reward, motivation, motor control. Ya nse na Parkinson; dysregulated na schizophrenia.
lingala.mood_sleep_appetite_ssris_target_reupt: Mood, mpongi, mposa ya kolia. SSRI ezali target reuptake.
lingala.neuromuscular_junction_memory_attentio: Neuromuscular junction. Memory + attention. Ya nse na Alzheimer.
lingala.astrocytes_support_bbb_oligodendrocyte: Astrocyte (support, BBB), oligodendrocyte (myelin na CNS), microglia (immune), ependymal cell (cerebrospinal fluid).
lingala.cerebrum_cortex_thinking_perception_ce: Cerebrum (cortex — kokanisa, perception), cerebellum (motor coordination), brainstem (autonomic), limbic system (mayoki + memory).
lingala.brain_reorganizes_itself_strongest_in_: Bɔɔngɔ esalaka réorganiser yango moko — makasi koleka na bomwana, kasi ekobaka na bomoi mobimba. Moboko ya learning.
lingala.tight_junctions_between_brain_capillar: tight junction kati na brain capillary cell etikaka molecule mingi na libanda. Mokakatano monene mpo na drug delivery na CNS.
lingala.20_of_body_s_energy_at_rest_despite_be: ~20% ya nguya ya nzoto tango ya bopemi (atako ezali ~2% ya mass). Mingi mpo na Na+/K+ pump oyo ebatelaka ion gradient.
lingala.first_mass_produced_human_protein_made: Protein ya bomoto ya liboso oyo esalemaki na motango. Esalemaki na E. coli (1982). Ezongisaki insulin ya ngulu + ngɔmbɛ.
lingala.single_target_therapies_humira_autoimm: Single-target therapy. Humira (autoimmune), Herceptin (HER2+ breast cancer), Keytruda (immunotherapy).
lingala.covid_19_vaccines_pfizer_moderna_self_: COVID-19 vaccine (Pfizer, Moderna). Self-amplifying version + non-COVID application na bokoli.
lingala.replace_defective_genes_luxturna_inher: Ezongisaka gene oyo ebebi. Luxturna (bokufi ya miso ya libota, FDA 2017). Zolgensma (SMA, 2019).
lingala.engineered_immune_cells_yescarta_kymri: immune cell oyo esalemi injiniya. Yescarta + Kymriah mpo na blood cancer. ~$400,000 na dose.
lingala.bone_marrow_transplants_standard_for_d: Bone marrow transplant ezali standard mbula mingi. newer iPSC + ESC approach na boluki.
lingala.print_tissue_with_living_cells_scaffol: Print tissue na living cell + scaffold. Loposo, cartilage, mafulu. Biteni mobimba naino mosika.
lingala.engineer_biological_systems_bacteria_t: Injiniya biological system. Bakteri oyo esalaka nkisi, yeast oyo esalaka opioid, algal biofuel.
lingala.bt_corn_insect_resistance_roundup_read: Bt corn (insect resistance), Roundup Ready (herbicide), Golden Rice (vitamin A).
lingala.str_profiling_mtdna_degraded_samples_y: STR profiling, mtDNA (sample oyo ebebi), Y chromosome (molɔngɔ́ ya tata). Bokokanisi ya database.
lingala.snp_arrays_23andme_ancestrydna_reveals: SNP array (23andMe, AncestryDNA). Emonisaka biogeographic ancestry + bandeko ya DNA.
lingala.detect_cancer_dna_in_blood_earlier_dia: Detect cancer DNA na makila. Boyebi ya liboso, treatment monitoring.
lingala.treat_solid_tumors_til_therapy_iovance: Kosálisa solid tumor. TIL therapy (Iovance, melanoma) FDA-approved na 2024.
lingala.engineered_microbes_clean_up_oil_spill: Microbe oyo esalemi injiniya epɛtɔlaka bopanzani ya mafuta, bosoto ya plastiki, bibende ya kilo.
lingala.amplifies_specific_dna_sequences_a_bil: Emataka DNA sequence ya sikisiki mbala miliyar. workhorse ya molecular biology, diagnostics, forensics.
lingala.originally_a_bacterial_immune_system_n: Na ebandeli bacterial immune system, sikoyo programmable gene-editing tool. Doudna + Charpentier bakabolaki Nobel 2020.
lingala.viruses_are_non_living_infectious_agen: Virus ezali non-living infectious agent — esengeli na host cell mpo na komata. Ekabolamaka na genome type (Baltimore classification), envelope, lolenge.
lingala.microbiome_science_is_advancing_fast_m: Microbiome science ezali kokende liboso mbangu. Maloba mingi ya lokumu (probiotic strain ya sikisiki oyo "esilisaka" condition ya sikisiki) ezali liboso ya litatoli. Kangamá na bilembeteli oyo bazongisaki makasi.
lingala.germ_layers_what_each_forms: Germ layer — nini moko na moko esalaka
lingala.defined_by_hanahan_weinberg_2000_updat: Elimbolami na Hanahan + Weinberg (2000, mise à jour 2011). Cancer mingi ezwaka bilembo mingi. Therapy esalaka target bilembo ya sikisiki koleka.
